caption: A man and a woman are seated in wooden chairs on a stage with a purple-lit background. The man wears a white button-down shirt and dark pants, while the woman wears a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" visible, along with a graphic logo below it. Both individuals have microphones attached to their faces. A white piece of technical equipment sits on a low table in front of them. Throughout the sequence, the man is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, shifting from resting them in his lap to gesturing outward and then bringing them together. The woman sits attentively, listening to him with a slight smile, her hands clasped in her lap. The lighting and their positions remain constant as the man's hand movements and facial expressions evolve while he addresses the woman.
